'''Cola Quis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]], [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and member of the [[Commerce Council]].

==Biography==
Quis served the New Republic during the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

Later, after the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], Quis managed to reach [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], where the New Republic regrouped. Due to the death of the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Borsk Fey'lya]], a new campaign to choose a Chief of State began, and Quis was nominated as one of the candidates along with [[Cal Omas]], [[Fyor Rodan]] and [[Ta'laam Ranth]]. Though Quis did began with a good lead, it was soon obvious that he would never get the post: The race was mainly among the other three candidates.

The initial results gave thirty-five percent of the votes to Rodan; twenty-eight percent to Omas; eighteen percent to Ranth and ten percent to Quis. There were some abstentions and a few votes scattered among other minor candidates, surprisingly including [[Pwoe]]. Senator of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] [[Triebakk]] (as Omas' representative) tried to convince Quis to give his votes to Omas, as it was clear that Quis couldn't win. Rodan also tried to get Quis' votes.

Ranth increased his percentage to twenty-two, being then able to deliver the election to one of the main candidates, while Quis dropped out of the race when Omas promised to name him chairman of the Commerce Council and give midlevel ministry jobs to several of his friends, and an office of the [[Kellmer Institute of Galactic History|Kellmer Institute]] of Higher Learning for Ryloth.
